name: Orange-Cashew Cookies
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Beat butter and sugar in a large bowl until creamy. Beat in egg, orange peel, and juice until light and fluffy. Mix in flour, baking soda, and salt until well blended. Stir in cashews. Drop tablespoonfuls of dough about 2 inches apart onto ungreased cookie sheets. Bake for 9 minutes or until lightly browned. Remove to wire racks; cool completely. Store in an airtight container.
